What We Offer

Our Services

Every service available mobile at your location or in-shop at our facility. We come fully equipped to wherever is most convenient for you.

Mobile Available
In-Shop Available
Interior Detail
A full cabin restoration. Every surface, every corner vacuumed, wiped down, and refreshed to feel brand new.
  • Full vacuum of seats, carpets, and trunk
  • Dashboard and console deep clean
  • Door panels and trim detail
  • Interior glass cleaning
  • Air freshener treatment
Book This Service
Exterior Detail
Your paint, wheels, tires, and glass treated right. We bring back the gloss and protect the finish.
  • Foam pre-soak and hand dry
  • Wheel and rim detail
  • Streak-free glass treatment
  • Tire shine and dressing
  • Exterior hand wash
Book This Service
Full Detail
The complete AB Detailing treatment. Inside and out, head to toe. Best value for a total vehicle refresh.
  • Full interior detail included
  • Full exterior detail included
  • Door jamb cleaning
  • Engine bay wipe on request
  • Best overall value
Book This Service

Why AB Detailing

We Take Your Car Personally.

Every vehicle we touch gets the same meticulous care, whether it's a daily driver or a weekend show car. Central PA's trusted detail shop since 2023.

Mobile Convenience
We come to you. Home, work, anywhere. No need to rearrange your day.
Professional Grade
Pro-quality products and techniques used on every single job, no shortcuts.
Flexible Scheduling
Evenings, weekends. We work around your schedule, not the other way around.
Trusted Locally
Real results. Real people. Central PA's trusted detailing service since 2023.

AB Detailing provides professional auto detailing in Camp Hill, Mechanicsburg, Shippensburg, and Carlisle, Pennsylvania, with mobile service across the surrounding Central PA region. From quick interior refreshes to full inside-and-out details, we bring showroom-quality results to your driveway or our shop.
